title: cordia senegalensis
intro: Cordia senegalensis, also known as West African Cordia, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Africa. The bark, leaves, and roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cordia senegalensis include treating fever, malaria, and respiratory infections, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. Cordia senegalensis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
